title: Methods of making graphene
description: You can buy my book  Graphene 101 An Inventors guide to making graphene at https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/304668 the money will help my research. thanks. This video just runs through some of the graphene production methods and the effects that starting product quality and processes will have. There is a good supplier available at http://graphite.com.co/online-store/
